items.name: prompt-block-editor
items.title: Prompt Block Editor
items.description: Shadcn skin for the package PromptBlockLibrary (CRUD for reusable prompt blocks), driven by usePromptBlocks. Requires @mano8/astro-prompt-m8 installed.

items.name: prompt-template-editor
items.title: Prompt Template Editor
items.description: Shadcn skin for the package PromptTemplateEditor (create / edit / block ordering / compose preview), driven by usePromptTemplates + useComposePrompt. Requires @mano8/astro-prompt-m8 installed.

items.name: prompt-dashboard-overview
items.title: Prompt Admin Dashboard Overview
items.description: Prompt-engine dashboard (stat cards + activity) driven by usePromptAdmin. Requires @mano8/astro-prompt-m8 installed.

items.name: prompt-maintenance-panel
items.title: Prompt Admin Maintenance Panel
items.description: Prompt admin danger zone (delete block / delete template), each behind a shadcn alert-dialog confirmation, driven by usePromptBlocks + usePromptTemplates. Requires @mano8/astro-prompt-m8 installed.

items.name: admin-prompt-dashboard
items.title: Admin Prompt Dashboard
items.description: Prompt admin view whose first/landing tab is the overview dashboard and destructive ops live in a guarded Maintenance tab; wraps the package's PromptProvider + RequireSuperuser. Requires @mano8/astro-prompt-m8 (and a fa-auth-m8 token adapter) installed.
